publishedAbstract: - New install with ODF Internal Mode and Multus network configured ~~~ network: connections: encryption: {} multiClusterService: {} provider: multus selectors: cluster: openshift-storage/odf-cluster #--> 192.168.17.0/24 VLAN 317 public: openshift-storage/odf-public #--> 192.168.16.0/24 VLAN 316 ~~~ Example of NAD odf-public: ~~~ apiVersion: k8s.cni.cncf.io/v1 kind: NetworkAttachmentDefinition metadata: name: odf-public namespace: openshift-storage spec: config: '{"cniVersion": "0.3.1", "type": "macvlan", "master": "vlan316", "mode": "bridge", "ipam": {"type": "whereabouts", "range": "192.168.16.0/24", "range_start": "192.168.16.20", "range_end": "192.168.16.255"}}' ~~~- noobaa-db pod fails to start: ~~~ noobaa-db-pg-0 0/1 ContainerCreating 0 24m ~~~ with error ~~~ MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "pvc-407c98e3-2fe9-4b25-84ca-1d1b1d001d78": rpc error: code = DeadlineExceeded desc = context deadline exceeded ~~~- Example of initial NNCP on OCP node worker4 (that was not valid, see below Resolution section) ~~~ apiVersion: nmstate.io/v1 kind: NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy metadata: name: bond1-vlans-worker4 spec: desiredState: interfaces:- link-aggregation: mode: 802.3ad options: miimon: '100' port:- eno6- eno8 name: bond1 state: up type: bond- ipv4: address:- ip: 192.168.16.4 prefix-length: 24 dhcp: false enabled: true name: vlan316 state: up type: vlan vlan: base-iface: bond1 id: 316- ipv4: address:- ip: 192.168.17.4 prefix-length: 24 dhcp: false enabled: true name: vlan317 state: up type: vlan vlan: base-iface: bond1 id: 317 nodeSelector: kubernetes.io/hostname: worker4 ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF with Multus - Pod in ContainerCreating fails to mount ceph-rbd : Slow GRPC request
